command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== DEPLOY HANDOFF TO vm-memory ==='
echo '' | base64 -d | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     'cat > /home/jose/moreno-ai/memory/operator/handoff/latest-claude-handoff.md' 2>&1
echo "handoff deployed"

echo '=== COMMIT HANDOFF ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
git config user.email "claude@moreno-ai" 2>/dev/null || true
git config user.name "Claude (ecosystem session)" 2>/dev/null || true
git add memory/operator/handoff/latest-claude-handoff.md
git commit -m "handoff: Claude session 2026-06-25 — delegator pipeline, amendment A, cleanup"
git push origin main 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "committed and pushed: $(git log --oneline -1)"
' 2>&1

echo '=== JOB STATUS POLL ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --payload-b64 'eyJhY3Rpb24iOiAiZ2V0X2pvYl9zdGF0dXMiLCAiam9iX2lkIjogImpvYi0yMDI2MDYyNVQxNDE3MjNaLWFiZTZkMjlmIiwgIm9yaWdpbiI6ICJoYW5kb2ZmLWRlcGxveSIsICJyZXF1ZXN0ZWRfYnkiOiAiam9zZSJ9'" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
j=d.get('job',{})
print('status:', j.get('status'))
print('stage:', j.get('stage'))
wu=j.get('worker_usage',{})
print('3060:', wu.get('windows-ollama-3060',0), '  3090:', wu.get('windows-ollama-3090',0))
for ev in j.get('events',[]): print(' ',ev['at'][-9:],ev['stage'],'-',ev['message'][:70])
result=j.get('result',{})
if result: print('RESULT:', str(result)[:500])
print('artifacts:', list(j.get('artifacts',{}).keys()))
"

echo DONE_1978
